title: Longest Substring with At Least K Repeating Characters
hints: Identify a character that appears fewer than k times in the entire string. This character can never be part of the valid substring.
Use this character as a split point. The longest valid substring must lie entirely within one of the segments created by removing this character.
Recursively solve the problem for each segment. The answer is the maximum result from all segments. Base case: if all characters appear at least k times, return the length.
